text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to a sports store to take advantage of a
sale.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a crowd of Umamusume lined up in front,
eagerly awaiting the store's opening.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: It's almost time! I won't let anyone steal my deals!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the invite, Ines! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Those super cute—I mean, advanced shoes I've been eyeing will be mine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're going to fight over those deals, right? I'll
join in and win too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the eagerly awaited (for different
reasons) sale begins...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yoink!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: This one's mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Customers pour in, and the store turns into a
battleground. Ines Fujin is fearless in the thick of
the fray.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huff, huff... This is harder than I thought. We
need to retreat for now!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that was so fun! It felt like a super close
race! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Uh, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay—nice job, everyone! Did you all get what
you wanted?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: No. It was a bloodbath for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And then there's Fine... I don't think she was even
looking for anything specific. She just went for
anything she saw.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I wanted was to have fun! ♪ And I
got loads of it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Ines! You made out like a bandit! Is all that
on the bench your loot?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, well, I'm a pro at this! Like—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Half off frozen foods?! I can't miss this!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If I buy a bunch now, we'll have plenty of easy
dinner options for a long time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. The Twinkle ☆ Wand, huh? So that's what
you want.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll go and buy one for you! I've still got
plenty of money this month. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(The holiday sale will have some stiff
competition, but they don't stand a chance
against me!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I've been bargain hunting for my parents and
little sisters for years!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Sometimes Ines still rushes out when she
hears about a sale going on.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Aw, that's cute. ♪ I guess you owe some of your
racing speed to your shopping habits!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, guess so!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! Ryan, you wanted those cute shoes,
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What?! How did you know?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm great at reading people! ♪ Here, I'll go get
them for you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah! Ines, wait! I wanna go bargain hunting too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Didn't know being a big sister gave you
psychic abilities.
